title: Chilli Chicken Livers
excerpt: Ingredients 60 g butter 1 onion, finely chopped 1 red sweet pepper, finely chopped 500g chicken livers, cleaned 300 ml homemade chilli sauce (see recipe) salt and pepper 250 ml cream Method Melt the butter in a pan, add the onion and sweet pepper and fry until soft. Add the chicken livers and fry until …
html:
Ingredients

  • 60 g butter
  • 1 onion, finely chopped
  • 1 red sweet pepper, finely chopped
  • 500g chicken livers, cleaned
  • 300 ml homemade chilli sauce (see recipe)
  • salt and pepper
  • 250 ml cream

Method

Melt the butter in a pan, add the onion and sweet pepper and fry until soft. Add the chicken livers and fry until light brown, but still pink in the middle. Add the chilli sauce and fry for 2 minutes.

Add salt and pepper to taste. Add the cream and let it warm through. Remove from the heat.

Serves 4 portions with fresh bread.

Easy!
